creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Updated my GitHub repo for the AUTHORS and README files, that should fix the install.

Can you try this with the new 10.1.13 port as well? Available in my Github repo https://github.com/Sp1l/ports/tree/master/databases/mariadb101-server and as a raw patch in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D5751
